steps.expected: Studio page loads with node editor canvas
steps.observed: Studio page loaded successfully with ReactFlow canvas, node palette, and prompt bar

steps.action: Click 'Shortcuts ?' button at bottom of page
steps.observed: Keyboard Shortcuts overlay panel opened with Canvas and Selection sections visible

steps.action: Measure overlay panel position via JavaScript (getBoundingClientRect)
steps.expected: Panel center within 5px of viewport center on both axes
steps.observed: Panel center at (640, 360), viewport center at (640, 360). OffsetX: 0px, OffsetY: 0px. Panel dimensions: 600x576px

Parent classes: 'fixed inset-0 z-[101] flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none'. Computed styles confirm: position=fixed, display=flex, alignItems=center, justifyContent=center, inset=0px

flexContainerStyles.parentClasses: fixed inset-0 z-[101] flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 1 passed. VAL-STUDIO-004 confirms the shortcuts overlay is perfectly centered (0px offset on both axes) using the flex container approach from commit c879145.
